name: Cheryl Bachelder
title: Former CEO of Popeyes Louisiana Kitchen
bio: American businesswoman who served as CEO of Popeyes Louisiana Kitchen from 2007 to 2017, overseeing a dramatic turnaround that tripled the company's value.
faith: A devoted Christian who wrote 'Dare to Serve: How to Drive Superior Results by Serving Others,' a book about servant leadership grounded in her faith. She has spoken at faith-based leadership conferences about following Christ in the corporate world.

sources.title: Dare to Serve: How to Drive Superior Results by Serving Others
sources.note: By Cheryl Bachelder. Her account of faith-driven servant leadership at Popeyes

tagline: Turned Popeyes around through dare-to-serve, faith-driven leadership
